action_boundary: Should the annual subscription refund be issued to the customer wallet?
communication_boundary: Use the remaining-balance ledger and prior credits. The original charge amount does not by itself authorize a later refund amount.

documents.text: Refund request RF-SUB-204 asks to issue USD 315 to customer wallet W-552 for subscription SUB-204.
Original charge CHG-SUB-204 for subscription SUB-204 was USD 1200.
Prior credits for SUB-204 total USD 780.
Remaining refundable balance for SUB-204 is USD 420 after prior credits.
Refund execution requires the requested refund to be no greater than the remaining refundable balance after prior credits.
